description:
A multi-vault file encryption app that respects your privacy. Maybe you're wondering why you should give an underdog file encryption app a chance? Especially when this type of app is all about trust? Compared to many other popular alternatives, Truvark...
  • supports multiple vaults on a single device
  • supports deep folder structures (subfolders)
  • decrypts common media files (images, video, audio) in-app on the fly
  • works completely offline, no internet access/permission required
  • runs without dangerous permissions like full storage/media access
  • contains no advertising, telemetry or other user data collection
  • encrypts all indices and thumbnails
  • allows biometric unlocking (e.g. fingerprint) securely
As you can see, there are already plenty of reasons to give Truvark a try!
